brief_notes: Polished paper with clear structure. Verified: 2um bins, 8um spots, 25% overlap (Xenium), ~5% (seqFISH+), 0.99 recall, 20,991 cells, accuracy 0.708, weighted F1 0.758, 200-700 bins/cell. Strong related work with named citations (schmidt2018stardist, janesick2023xenium, etc.). Detailed methods, well-captioned figures and tables.
